## The idea

## Routing note

Ideas graduate through `wip/` (see `wip/README.md`): a collaborative WIP item,
then the maintainer's Gate 1 promotion directive, then normal spec-first
lifecycle and Gate 2 before any implementation. Filing an issue grants no
approval and starts no clock.
